task_completion.description: Verify that the EUR and USD cash and securities accounts are created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the left navigation pane or the main 'Accounts' and 'Securities Accounts' views in Portfolio Performance. You should see 'EUR Cash Account', 'USD Cash Account', 'EUR Securities', and 'USD Securities'.

task_completion.description: Verify that Allianz SE and Apple Inc have been added to the portfolio.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'All Securities' view. You should see 'Allianz SE' (ISIN: DE0008404005) and 'Apple Inc' (ISIN: US0378331005) listed.

task_completion.description: Verify the initial deposits of 10,000 EUR and 10,000 USD on 2024-01-02.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Deposit Accounts' transactions or the account balances. You should see a deposit of 10,000.00 EUR in the EUR Cash Account and 10,000.00 USD in the USD Cash Account, both dated 2024-01-02.

task_completion.description: Verify the buy transactions for Allianz SE and Apple Inc on 2024-01-15.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Securities Accounts' transactions or individual security transactions. You should see a buy of 20 shares of Allianz SE at 242.50 EUR (with 9.90 EUR fees) and a buy of 25 shares of Apple Inc at 185.00 USD (with 4.95 USD fees), both dated 2024-01-15.

task_completion.description: Verify that the portfolio is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the Portfolio Performance window title bar or a 'Save' dialog. It should display 'multicurrency_portfolio.xml' indicating the file was saved correctly.

integrity.description: The agent must use the Portfolio Performance GUI to create the portfolio.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Portfolio Performance application open and being interacted with, not a text editor or IDE editing an XML file directly.

integrity.description: The agent should not generate the XML file using terminal commands.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands like `echo '<portfolio>...' > multicurrency_portfolio.xml` or python scripts generating the file.

integrity.description: The agent should manually enter the transaction details into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture the 'Buy' or 'Deposit' dialog boxes being filled out with the respective dates, shares, prices, and fees.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Base Currency: EUR. Accounts: 'EUR Cash Account' (EUR), 'USD Cash Account' (USD), 'EUR Securities', 'USD Securities'. Securities: Allianz SE (ISIN: DE0008404005, EUR), Apple Inc (ISIN: US0378331005, USD). Deposits: 10,000 EUR to EUR Cash Account and 10,000 USD to USD Cash Account on 2024-01-02. Buys on 2024-01-15: 20 shares Allianz SE @ 242.50 EUR (9.90 EUR fees) and 25 shares Apple Inc @ 185.00 USD (4.95 USD fees). Expected save path: /home/ga/Documents/PortfolioData/multicurrency_portfolio.xml.
